ham.subject: Transaction Alert: Recent Activity on Your Account
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We have detected a recent transaction on your account:

• Date: 2026-04-10
• Amount: $1,250.00
• Merchant: Acme Electronics
• Transaction ID: 842-5691-23

If you recognize this transaction, no further action is required. If you do not recognize this transaction, please contact our support team immediately.

Thank you for banking with us.

Sincerely,
Your Bank

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required to Avoid Late Delivery Fees
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Our records indicate that your shipment with FedEx (Tracking # 1234567890) was not delivered due to an outstanding delivery fee. If this issue is not resolved within 24 hours, additional fees will be automatically applied, and your package may be returned to the sender.

To verify the delivery status and pay the pending fee, please click the link below:

<URL>

Please note that failure to complete the payment will result in a $75 delivery fee, plus a $50 late shipment penalty.

We urge you to complete the transaction immediately.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best Regards,
FedEx Customer Support
